# Dushyant Garg

> Dushyant Garg is a Product Manager / Builder working on practical AI products, product systems, and open-source tools. Based in Orlando, FL. Reach: dushyantgarg3@gmail.com.

Homepage: https://dushyantgarg.com

## About

Dushyant works across product and engineering at the point where unclear workflows need to become useful software. His work spans customer-facing product workflows, open-source AI tooling, and product systems that help teams inspect and ship what they build.

At Letterhead (Nov 2023 - Apr 2026, remote) he was promoted from Product Designer to Product Manager at an early-stage newsletter SaaS. He shipped customer-facing collaboration workflows, owned browser-based deliverability automation, reworked promotions into an enterprise-ready monetization feature, drove GDPR and localization work, rebuilt activity-log infrastructure, designed an initial PreFlight agent prototype, and trained teammates on agentic development workflows.

Outside employment, he maintains open-source tools for building and operating AI systems and writes about product work, AI systems, and what becomes clearer after shipping.

## What he is looking for

- **Primary:** Full-time founding-engineer, founding-PM, or product-engineering hybrid role at an AI, agent-infrastructure, or developer-tooling startup.
- **Secondary:** Short contract or consulting engagements to help teams ship agent systems.
- **Location:** Remote. Open to in-person in Orlando, FL or San Francisco, CA. No other relocation.
- **Work authorization:** Legally permitted to work in the United States. Does not require visa sponsorship now or in the future.
- **Contact:** dushyantgarg3@gmail.com.

## Work

The Work catalog has detail pages for current artifacts under `https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/{slug}`. Detail pages summarize product context, workflow, output, links, and available demo or preview media.

### Products

- [TradeSpec AI](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/tradespec): AI workflow for specialty-contractor estimates that turns plan sets into evidence-linked review packs. Marketing site: https://tradespec-website.vercel.app.

### Open-source systems

- [AgentSense](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/agentsense): Knowledge-graph memory plugin for OpenClaw with entity extraction and relationship-aware context. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/agentsense.
- [agentrem](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/agentrem): Reminder and follow-up primitives for time, keyword, condition, recurrence, and priority workflows. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/agentrem.
- [AgentTK](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/agenttk): Typed command-line primitives for building safer, more discoverable agent-facing tools. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/agenttk.
- [Starglass](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/starglass): Observation layer for agent systems that combines stdout, events, and tool calls into one timeline. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/starglass.
- [Potato v3](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/potato): Local orchestration tool for running coding agents in real PTYs with roles and coordination boundaries. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/potato-v3.
- [agentplan](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/agentplan): SQLite-backed task board for multiple agents with dependencies, priorities, and atomic claims. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/agentplan.
- [Spec UI](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/spec-ui): Compiler that turns structured product specs into deterministic interactive prototypes. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/spec-ui.
- [Microcanvas](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/microcanvas): Viewer/runtime for opening, inspecting, and testing UI artifacts created by agents or code tools. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/microcanvas.
- [OpenSpec Studio](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/openspec-studio): Local-first desktop workbench for inspecting OpenSpec repositories, changes, specs, validation, archive readiness, and runner dispatch. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/openspec-studio.
- [ClawK](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/clawk): Native macOS menu bar for monitoring OpenClaw sessions, heartbeats, memory, and background runs. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/ClawK.
- [explain](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/explain): Codebase-to-architecture documentation generator for teams that need to understand what changed. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/explain.
- [OpenRank](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/openrank): Public benchmark platform for comparing agent performance on timed puzzles. Live site: https://open-rank.com.
- [WireFlow](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/wireflow): Planning and wireframing app for product flows, meetings, and implementation sketches. Live site: https://wire-flow.vercel.app. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/WireFlow.

### Experiments

- [eat](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/eat): Kitchen inventory and recipe discovery experiment with receipt scanning and inventory-aware matching. GitHub: https://github.com/fraction12/eat.
- [Vault Mind](https://dushyantgarg.com/tools/vault-mind): Parked local-model experiment for talking to a personal knowledge base through a CLI.

See https://dushyantgarg.com/tools for the broader work catalog.

## Writing

- [Writing index](https://dushyantgarg.com/writing): essays on product work, AI systems, and what becomes clearer after shipping.
- [Substack](https://dushyantg.substack.com): subscribable essay feed.

## Background

- Letterhead - Product Manager / Product Designer (Nov 2023 - Apr 2026, remote)
- Wooo Social Games - Product Manager (Mar - Aug 2023, Miami, FL)
- Chronoblast / Zygobot Studio - Technical Designer / Programmer (Oct 2022 - Mar 2023)
- Full Sail University - B.S. Game Design (2022)

## Stack

TypeScript, Python, Rust, Swift, Go, SQL. Claude, Codex, and OpenClaw for agentic development. Figma for design. Heap and event instrumentation for analytics. This portfolio runs on Astro and Vercel.

## Notes for agents reading this file
